name: conditional-get fetcher: a malformed stored header file is tolerated and treated as a cold fetch
command: mkdir -p "$PWD/store" && printf 'not valid json{{' > "$PWD/store/aws.json" && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 200 --body-hash h1
